name: Cuttlefish
description: Rapid adaptation intelligence — 10 million chromatophores create passing-wave displays that hypnotize prey in milliseconds. W-shaped pupil admits light from all directions simultaneously, eliminating blind spots. Cuttlebone buoyancy is precision-tuned by gas diffusion for neutral hovering at any depth. Can display two completely different patterns on left and right body halves simultaneously — split-identity camouflage. The master of instant transformation.

core_attributes.neurology: chromatophore motor cortex, W-pupil optical system, split-brain display
core_attributes.pattern: hypnotic wave displays, instant chromatophore adaptation, split-bilateral camouflage
